headline: Is Philip Morris International Inc. (PM) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PM a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Philip Morris International Inc. on r/investing_discussion by Variant_Invest. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PM. Philip Morris International Inc.’s share was trading at $182.95 as of June 10th. PM’s trailing and forward P/E were 25.76 and 21.69 respectively according […]

headline: 3 Safe Haven Stocks For Market Chaos
summary: Geopolitical tensions and rising volatility are driving investors toward defensive sectors. Discover 3 dividend stocks with resilient demand, strong pricing power, and dependable income.

headline: Philip Morris International Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend of $1.47 Per Share
summary: STAMFORD, CT, June 11, 2026--Regulatory News: The Board of Directors of Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE: PM) today declared a regular quarterly dividend of $1.47 per common share, payable on July 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 25, 2026. The ex-dividend date is June 25, 2026. For more details on stock, dividends and other information, see www.pmi.com/dividend.
